desc: Narrator chain from Shaykh al-Saduq through multiple narrators to Imam Ali (as)
Prohibitions on eating in janaba, nail cutting, miswak in bathroom, etc.
Rulings on bathing, drinking water, urination, qibla direction
Funeral practices, lying about dreams, making images, burning animals
Business interference, speech during intimacy, women's obligations, marriage conditions
Fortune-telling, gambling, backbiting, gossiping, false oaths, bathhouses, silk
Selling fruits prematurely, wine curse, usury, commercial transactions
Mosque conduct, looking at privates, prayer locations, bees, oaths, rings, prayer times
Fasting days, drinking water, hiring workers, boycotting, gold/silver trade, overpraising
Warning against supporting tyrants, building for show, oppressing workers, neighbors' rights, learning Quran
Punishment for adultery, forbidding immoral acts, peeping, patience with sustenance, arrogance
Oppressing women's dowry, concealing testimony, neighbors, rights of slaves, toothstick, night prayer
Honoring the poor, avoiding temptation, filling eyes with forbidden, cheating Muslims, kindness
Harming spouse with tongue, striking Muslims, sleeping with grudge, backbiting consequences
Betrayal of trust, false witness, withholding loans, patience with difficult spouse, honoring Muslims
Leading prayer properly, visiting relatives, helping blind/sick, relieving burdens
Invalidating rights, whipping for tyrant, charity, funeral prayer, tears, mosque attendance, adhan
Adhan rewards, fortune-teller leadership, do not underestimate evil or overestimate good
Closing about the hadith being from the dictations of the Prophet and handwriting of Ali
